name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.74 Area calendars and default Areas refinement
label: Area calendars and default Areas refinement
release_notes: Calendar Sync now creates or reuses Google calendars named after Pathmark Areas, with fresh sheets starting from four broad default Areas.
notes: Calendar Sync creates or reuses Google calendars named exactly after the relevant Area
Project steps and routine activities sync to their matching Area calendar
Area colour metadata is stored and used when applying Google calendar colours where possible
Fresh Pathmark Sync sheets now begin with Body And Stability, Expression And Culture, Home And Garden, and Making And Craft
Privacy and consent wording now reflects Area calendar management
